title: T-SUN Rechargeable LED Work Light with Metal Stand,4100Lumen Portable Magnetic Camping Light,10400Ah Battery,Job Site Lighting for Outdoor Barbecue Golf Fishing Indoor Workshop Garage
features: Multiple Lighting Modes - This T-SUN LED work light with stand offers 3 adjustable brightness levels (820/1870/4100 lumens), 6500K colour temperatures and 3 Lighting modes. Perfect for camping tent ambiance or task-intensive environments like garages and workshops.

Four Lamp Heads with Magnetic Base - Designed with four LED lamp heads, this battery powered work light provides exceptional illumination coverage. The heads can rotate 180° vertically and 270° horizontally. The greater bottom magnetic base securely attaches to metal surfaces, ensuring you get the perfect angle of light, making it ideal for a variety of activities such as construction, painting, or detailing.

10400 mAh High Capacity Battery - Equipped with a 10400 mAh rechargeable Li-battery, this rechargeable camp light can run up to 5 hours on maximum brightness and 11 hours on the lowest setting. USB-C port enables fast recharging and power bank functionality to charge phones/headlamps during camping.

Adjustable Metal Tripod & IP44 Water-Resistant Tent Light - The IP44-rated LED spotlight withstands rain/splash during outdoor use. The detachable aluminum tripod (34.05"-57.71" adjustable) more sturdy and durable than other plastics and its lightweight foldable design ensures easy transport. Ideal for workshops, muddy campsites, and wet job sites.

Carrying Bag Included--Weighing just 5 lbs, this portable work light kit includes a durable black carrying bag for effortless storage and transport. Take it anywhere—whether you’re working at home, on a job site, or heading out for a camping trip—this work light will be your reliable companion for any task.
